Bash(git commit -m "Add media posters and interactive channel resizing

Features added:
- Plex poster integration for media bars and tooltips
- Channel height scaling with settings slider (50%-200%)
- Interactive drag-to-resize handles on channel items
- Poster aspect ratio preservation during scaling

Media Posters:
- Display Plex artwork on left side of media bars
- Show posters in hover tooltips with media info
- Smart poster source detection (thumb, art, parentThumb, grandparentThumb)
- Toggle setting in Interface Settings panel
- Proper aspect ratio maintenance when scaling

Interactive Channel Resizing:
- Visual resize handles at bottom of each channel item
- Drag up/down to adjust channel height in real-time
- Synchronized scaling of channels, program bars, and posters
- Real-time settings panel synchronization
- Auto-save on resize completion
- Enhanced visual feedback with glowing effects

Technical improvements:
- Proper event handling with drag state management
- Aspect ratio calculations for poster scaling
- Performance optimized with proper cleanup functions
- Responsive design maintained across all scale sizes

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>")

Bash(git commit -m "Implement Plex categories and collections support

Features added:
- Full categories discovery via Plex hubs API (/hubs)
- Collections discovery across all libraries (/library/sections/{key}/collections)
- Channel loading support for both categories and collections
- TV show expansion in collections (episodes from shows)
- Progress tracking during category/collection loading

Categories (Plex Hubs):
- Discovers trending, recently added, and recommendation hubs
- Loads actual hub content via /hubs/{key} endpoint
- Limited to 20 items per category for performance
- Clear labeling as (Category) in channel names

Collections:
- Discovers user-created collections from all libraries
- Loads collection items via /library/collections/{key}/items
- Supports TV show expansion to individual episodes
- Shows source library context in channel names
- Limited to 30 items per collection for performance

Technical improvements:
- Proper error handling for missing hubs/collections
- Console logging for discovery debugging
- Integration with existing progress tracking system
- Maintains consistent channel structure with other content types

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>")
